title: Certificate of Formation — Limited Liability Company
disclaimer: Self-help document service — NOT legal or tax advice. Forms, fees, and requirements change; verify with the Texas Secretary of State and consult a licensed professional. You file with the Texas SOS yourself.

fields.name: entity_name
fields.label: LLC name
fields.help: Must be distinguishable from existing TX entities and include an LLC designator (e.g. 'LLC'). Check name availability with the TX SOS.

fields.name: registered_agent_type
fields.label: Registered agent type
fields.help: TX requires a registered agent with a Texas address. The agent must consent. See the registered-agent template.

fields.name: registered_agent_name
fields.label: Registered agent name
fields.help: Name of the consenting registered agent.

fields.name: registered_office_address
fields.label: Registered office address (TX)
fields.help: A physical Texas street address (not a PO box) where process can be served.

fields.name: management_structure
fields.label: Management structure
fields.help: Neutral list — the USER selects how the LLC is managed. The tool does not advise which to choose.

fields.name: governing_persons
fields.label: Initial members/managers
fields.help: Names and addresses of the initial governing persons.

fields.name: organizer_name
fields.label: Organizer name
fields.help: The person forming the LLC (signs the certificate).

fields.name: purpose
fields.label: Purpose
fields.help: Often a general lawful-purpose statement; verify TX requirements.
